name: api-standards
description: API pack — NestJS + Prisma. Auto-invoke: nestjs + code-quality standards, cross-stack-contracts (active when craft.json stacks has 2+ entries: unified error shape, cursor pagination, Bearer header standard, versioned routes), websockets (conditional on socket.io/ws usage: connection auth, backoff reconnect, event enum, schema versioning). db-migrations workflow (Prisma schema → migration → client regeneration).
